full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Rechecked every step against the paper PDF and removed any wording that could not be traced to a section/figure.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Which parts of Lee et al. correspond to hypothesis generation, volumetric compatibility, and inference in one concise mapping?
